records.ety: [L. masticatus, p. p. of masticare to chew, prob. fr. mastiche mastic. See Mastic.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Masticated (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Masticating (?).]

defs: To grind or crush with, or as with, the teeth and prepare for swallowing and digestion; to chew; as, to masticate food.
